prompt: Maintain the twins from the reference image, photorealistic style, a nearly empty baseball stadium. In the vast stands, there are no spectators other than the twins. A comical scene in the quiet stadium where the twins are enjoying nagashi somen using the spectator seats. Utilizing the slope of the seats, a long bamboo noodle slide extends from the upper to lower tiers of the stadium. The bamboo is supported by chairs and railings, creating a sense of massive scale unique to a stadium. One twin at the top is happily letting the noodles flow. The other twin is far below, seriously catching and eating the noodles with chopsticks and a bowl. Both are wearing casual summer clothes. A composition as if captured by chance by a sports broadcast telephoto camera. A composition capturing the bamboo slide from the front. Regular stadium seating, stadium lighting, bright summer natural light, realistic skin textures, natural expressions, and a comical everyday feel. Cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, documentary style, photorealistic, ultra-high definition, and realistic film quality. No corporate logos or text on clothing, signs, or the screen.
